skills.name: skillify
skills.description: Turn a working agent workflow into a reusable, tested, cross-agent skill pack.
triggers: 把这次流程沉淀成 skill
skills.summary: Bootstraps skill packs with documentation, code hooks, tests, evals, resolver metadata, and an HTML registry report.

skills.name: skillify-build-loop
skills.description: Implement an approved skill-pack plan with surgical edits, quality gates, resolver checks, and registry report updates.
triggers: 把这个技能包计划实现出来
按这个计划落地 skill pack
把我们这次的实现经验沉淀下来
skills.summary: Captures the tested implementation loop used to turn the approved skillify plan into a working cross-agent skill pack.
